title: Better Keyblade Combat
description: A data and eventually texture pack combo that adds Better Combat support for the kingdom hearts themed overhaul, Kingdom Keys 2
body:
Adding Better combat support to Kingdom Keys 2. I did my best to recreate some of the combat animations from the games using only Better Combat built in animations.

- Keyblades use an animation set that is meant to resemble Sora's combo from KH1
- org weapons (at least the ones that Better Combat supports adding animations too, sorry to Vexen players, but BC doesn't support attack animations for shields yet) are meant to as closely replicate thier 358 days _base_ weapon combo (the one that days uses for the default weapon with no upgrade/ability pannels added)
- Xigbar and Demyx currently have no combos as I feel I can't do them propper justice without custom animations

_No custom animations yet but I am working on learning blender to add them, when I do a link to the resource pack with new animations will be added in place of this line._
